name: ★ RAPPA ★
description:
The self-righteous Galaxy Ranger that chases Evil Ninja Osaru in the cosmos had invited you to join her in one of her training practices!

gosh, she's been needing of an UPDATE since she and a Shizuku bot (not the vampire one, it's deleted but I'll remake it) were transferred here. And she was made IMMEDIATELY after she was announced so..

and she is based off my actual Rappa ← (click to see the actual bot) bot which is my MOST popular one in my character ai account which is just WOW. And at the time, we didn't know shit about her personality, so I went by her bio that was given at the time.

So I changed and tweaked some things about this bot since there's MORE information and I'm not lazy right now so yeah :D

UPDATE: She has a second greeting now! Although do be warned as it does contain a spoiler to the Penacony story arc. I'll eventually add or fix details to her character, but I'm lazy right now.
